svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="OrderStateMachine" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="950" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Order Lifecycle — State Machine (OrderStatus)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="700" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="init" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="20" x="235" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_pend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PENDING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_paypend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PAYMENT_PENDING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_payconf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PAYMENT_CONFIRMED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_acc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ACCEPTED_BY_VENDOR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_prep" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PREPARING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_ready" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="READY_FOR_PICKUP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="160" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_disp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DISPATCH_PENDING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="560" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_assigned" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ASSIGNED_TO_COURIER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="560" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_picked" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PICKED_UP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="560" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_delivering" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DELIVERING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="560" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_delivered" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="DELIVERED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="560" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="final" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;shape=endState;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="24" x="635" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_rej" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="REJECTED_BY_VENDOR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="960" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_cancel" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;" value="CANCELLED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="960" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_refpend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="REFUND_PENDING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="960" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_ref" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;" value="REFUNDED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="960" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0" edge="1" parent="1" source="init" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="s_pend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_pend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_paypend" value="checkout"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_paypend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_payconf" value="payment confirmed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_payconf" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_acc" value="vendor accepts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_acc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_prep" value="start prep"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_prep" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_ready" value="ready"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t6" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_ready" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s_disp" value="request dispatch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t7" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_disp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_assigned" value="courier assigned"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t8" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_assigned" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_picked" value="picked up (at vendor)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t9" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_picked" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_delivering" value="en route"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t10" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_delivering" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_delivered" value="OTP confirmed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t11" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_delivered" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="final"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_paypend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="s_cancel" value="payment failed / user cancels"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_acc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s_rej" value="vendor rejects"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_rej" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_refpend" value="refund"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_refpend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="s_ref" value="refund settled"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s_delivering" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s_refpend" value="failed delivery → refund"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;rounded=1;" value="Legend: blue = in-progress · green = success terminal · red = cancelled/rejected · yellow = refund path · dashed = exception transition" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="980" x="160" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Legend: blue = in-progress · green = success terminal · red = cancelled/rejected · yellow = refund path · dashed = exception transition
